purpose: Ralph-lite slices aligned to DTP/PHB parents

slices.title: Runtime control proof matrix rows
slices.description: Extend only RuntimeControlDetailBoundedProofRunner and its report contract so --runtime-control-detail-proof emits one deterministic pass/fail row per required rollback failure_reason case.
acceptance_criteria: Proof artifact contains a matrix with one row per required_failure_reasons plus happy path row.
Each matrix row has deterministic pass/fail status and explicit expected vs actual failure_reason.
No production service behavior is changed outside runner/report wiring.

slices.title: Proof reproducibility and bootstrap contract
slices.description: Keep DTP-006B scoped to reproducibility metadata/bootstrap for runtime-control proof; no new failure-reason matrix logic here.
acceptance_criteria: Proof output/artifact includes reproducibility seed/bootstrap details required by DTP-006B.
No widening of production seams beyond runner-local proof wiring.
Verification commands pass in the current workspace runtime env.
